_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED FOR PTERODACTYL PANEL - PTERODACTYL.IO
name: fxManager + FiveM
author: someone@example.com
description: fxManager with fivem egg or smth.

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
set -Eeuo pipefail

export DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive
apt-get update -y
apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
    ca-certificates curl jq unzip xz-utils tar file openssl

if [ "$(uname -m)" != "x86_64" ]; then
    echo "[ERROR] FiveM/fxManager requires an amd64 (x86_64) node."
    exit 1
fi

mkdir -p /mnt/server
cd /mnt/server

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# fxManager core + web assets
# ------------------------------------------------------------
FXM_VERSION="${FXMANAGER_VERSION:-latest}"
if [ -z "${FXM_VERSION}" ] || [ "${FXM_VERSION}" = "latest" ]; then
    FXM_RELEASE_BASE="https://github.com/fxManagerProject/fxManager/releases/latest/download"
else
    FXM_TAG="${FXM_VERSION}"
    [[ "${FXM_TAG}" == v* ]] || FXM_TAG="v${FXM_TAG}"
    FXM_RELEASE_BASE="https://github.com/fxManagerProject/fxManager/releases/download/${FXM_TAG}"
fi

echo "[fxManager] Downloading Linux release (${FXM_VERSION})..."
curl -fL --retry 5 --retry-delay 2 \
    "${FXM_RELEASE_BASE}/fxmanager-linux.zip" \
    -o /tmp/fxmanager-linux.zip

rm -rf /mnt/server/assets /mnt/server/public
unzip -oq /tmp/fxmanager-linux.zip -d /mnt/server
chmod +x /mnt/server/fxmanager-linux
rm -f /tmp/fxmanager-linux.zip

if [ ! -x /mnt/server/fxmanager-linux ]; then
    echo "[ERROR] fxmanager-linux was not found after extraction."
    exit 1
fi

# Persistent cookie signing secret. Hidden through the egg file denylist.
if [ ! -s /mnt/server/.fxmanager.env ]; then
    printf 'COOKIE_SECRET=%s\n' "$(openssl rand -hex 32)" > /mnt/server/.fxmanager.env
    chmod 600 /mnt/server/.fxmanager.env
fi

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# FiveM Linux artifacts
# ------------------------------------------------------------
FIVEM_BASE="https://runtime.fivem.net/artifacts/fivem/build_proot_linux/master"
FIVEM_SELECTED="${FIVEM_VERSION:-recommended}"

if [ -n "${FIVEM_DOWNLOAD_URL:-}" ]; then
    FIVEM_URL="${FIVEM_DOWNLOAD_URL}"
else
    CHANGELOG_JSON="$(curl -fsSL --retry 5 https://changelogs-live.fivem.net/api/changelog/versions/linux/server)"

    case "${FIVEM_SELECTED}" in
        recommended|"")
            FIVEM_URL="$(printf '%s' "${CHANGELOG_JSON}" | jq -r '.recommended_download')"
            ;;
        latest)
            FIVEM_URL="$(printf '%s' "${CHANGELOG_JSON}" | jq -r '.latest_download')"
            ;;
        *)
            RELEASE_PAGE="$(curl -fsSL --retry 5 "${FIVEM_BASE}/")"
            VERSION_PATH="$(printf '%s' "${RELEASE_PAGE}" \
                | grep -Eo 'href="[^"]+/fx\.tar\.xz"' \
                | sed -E 's/^href="//; s/"$//; s#^\./##' \
                | grep -F "${FIVEM_SELECTED}" \
                | head -n 1 || true)"

            if [ -z "${VERSION_PATH}" ]; then
                echo "[WARN] Requested FiveM artifact was not found; using recommended."
                FIVEM_URL="$(printf '%s' "${CHANGELOG_JSON}" | jq -r '.recommended_download')"
            else
                FIVEM_URL="${FIVEM_BASE}/${VERSION_PATH}"
            fi
            ;;
    esac
fi

if [ -z "${FIVEM_URL}" ] || [ "${FIVEM_URL}" = "null" ]; then
    echo "[ERROR] Could not resolve the FiveM artifact download URL."
    exit 1
fi

echo "[FiveM] Downloading artifact: ${FIVEM_URL}"
curl -fL --retry 5 --retry-delay 2 "${FIVEM_URL}" -o /tmp/fx.tar.xz

echo "[FiveM] Extracting artifact..."
rm -rf /mnt/server/alpine
tar -xJf /tmp/fx.tar.xz -C /mnt/server
rm -f /tmp/fx.tar.xz

if [ ! -f /mnt/server/alpine/opt/cfx-server/FXServer ]; then
    echo "[ERROR] FXServer executable was not found after extraction."
    exit 1
fi
chmod +x /mnt/server/alpine/opt/cfx-server/FXServer

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Base server-data resources
# ------------------------------------------------------------
mkdir -p /mnt/server/server-data/resources
TMP_DATA="$(mktemp -d)"
curl -fL --retry 5 --retry-delay 2 \
    "https://github.com/citizenfx/cfx-server-data/archive/refs/heads/master.tar.gz" \
    -o "${TMP_DATA}/cfx-server-data.tar.gz"
tar -xzf "${TMP_DATA}/cfx-server-data.tar.gz" -C "${TMP_DATA}"
CFX_DATA_DIR="$(find "${TMP_DATA}" -maxdepth 1 -type d -name 'cfx-server-data-*' | head -n 1)"
if [ -z "${CFX_DATA_DIR}" ]; then
    echo "[ERROR] Could not extract cfx-server-data."
    rm -rf "${TMP_DATA}"
    exit 1
fi
cp -a "${CFX_DATA_DIR}/resources/." /mnt/server/server-data/resources/
rm -rf "${TMP_DATA}"

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# fxManager game resource (same release as the panel)
# ------------------------------------------------------------
echo "[fxManager] Installing game resource..."
curl -fL --retry 5 --retry-delay 2 \
    "${FXM_RELEASE_BASE}/fxmanager-resource.zip" \
    -o /tmp/fxmanager-resource.zip
rm -rf /mnt/server/server-data/resources/fxManager
unzip -oq /tmp/fxmanager-resource.zip -d /mnt/server/server-data/resources
rm -f /tmp/fxmanager-resource.zip

if [ ! -f /mnt/server/server-data/resources/fxManager/fxmanifest.lua ]; then
    echo "[ERROR] fxManager resource was not found after extraction."
    exit 1
fi

# Create a safe starter configuration only when none exists.
if [ ! -f /mnt/server/server-data/server.cfg ]; then
    cat > /mnt/server/server-data/server.cfg <<'CFG'
endpoint_add_tcp "0.0.0.0:30120"
endpoint_add_udp "0.0.0.0:30120"

sv_hostname "fxManager FiveM Server"
sets sv_projectName "fxManager FiveM Server"
sets sv_projectDesc "FiveM server managed by fxManager"

set sv_licenseKey "changeme"
set steam_webApiKey "none"
sv_maxclients 48
sv_scriptHookAllowed 0
set onesync on

ensure mapmanager
ensure chat
ensure spawnmanager
ensure sessionmanager
ensure hardcap
ensure rconlog

# Do not add 'ensure fxManager' here.
# fxManager starts its resource automatically with protected API arguments.
CFG
fi

mkdir -p /mnt/server/server-data/logs

echo "[OK] fxManager and FXServer installation completed."
echo "[INFO] Primary allocation: FiveM game port."
echo "[INFO] Add another allocation matching PANEL_PORT for the fxManager web interface."

variables.name: fxManager Version
variables.description: Version/tag of fxManager to install, for example v0.3.0. Use latest for the newest stable GitHub release.

variables.name: FiveM Artifact Version
variables.description: Use recommended, latest, a build number, or a full artifact folder such as 6013-d8ae399d15680da569022f57ab7f2474d307c821.

variables.name: Custom FiveM Download URL
variables.description: Optional direct URL to fx.tar.xz. Intended for administrators when the normal artifact endpoint is unavailable.

variables.name: FiveM License Key
variables.description: Required Cfx.re server license key from Keymaster.

variables.name: fxManager Panel Port
variables.description: Web interface port. Add this port as an additional allocation on the Pterodactyl server before starting it.

variables.name: Server Hostname
variables.description: FiveM server name displayed in the server browser.

variables.name: Maximum Players
variables.description: Maximum number of players. Your Cfx.re subscription/license limits still apply.

variables.name: Steam Web API Key
variables.description: Steam Web API key, or none when it is not required by your resources.

variables.name: Auto-start FXServer
variables.description: Automatically start FXServer when fxManager starts after the initial setup is complete.

variables.name: FXServer Executable
variables.description: Internal absolute path used by fxManager.

variables.name: FXServer Data Path
variables.description: Internal server-data path used by fxManager.

variables.name: FXServer Config File
variables.description: Configuration filename inside the server-data directory.

variables.name: Runtime Environment
variables.description: Keeps the compiled fxManager binary in production mode.
